author: Disney Parks YouTube
text:
Crafting The Score For Disneyland Handcrafted | Cyrus Reynolds Interview
Witness the inspired process that went into making the soundtrack for Disneyland Handcrafted, a Leslie Iwerks film. From recording session footage, to artist commentary, step behind the scenes with Cyrus Reynolds, the composer who brought the film's score to life. 🎶 

In this behind-the-scenes featurette, Reynolds shares his creative process behind the music, exploring how themes of imagination, innovation, and craftsmanship shaped the soundtrack. Drawing inspiration from the sounds of the craftsman and workers who built Disneyland, and the designs that Walt and his team imagined, the score combines sweeping orchestral melodies, pulsing modernist energy, and intimate moments of reflection to capture the spirit of a place where impossible ideas became reality.

Recorded by musicians from across the globe, the soundtrack was designed to honor both the wonder of Walt Disney's vision and the many extraordinary hands who helped him along the way.

Disneyland Handcrafted, available on ‪Disney Parks‬ YouTube and streaming on Disney+.

WATCH DISNEYALND HANDCRAFTED: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YtrVcOxVDls
